name: alterlab-chai
description: Predict biomolecular complexes with Chai-1, an open AlphaFold3-style model that folds multi-entity assemblies (proteins, ligands, nucleic acids) from a single typed FASTA — strong on antibody–antigen and protein–ligand complexes, with optional MSA and restraint inputs. Use when predicting an antibody–antigen complex, folding a mixed protein/ligand/nucleic-acid assembly described in one FASTA, or generating a complex with experimental restraints. For binding-affinity prediction or a ligand-focuse
author: AlterLab-IEU
